creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Added bsd.cl and removed the bsd argentina group.  The BSD Peru host 
is still running FreeBSD and still contains FreeBSD web content, it 
just appears that the site is possibly misconfigured at the moment. 

If you have more specific information you would like listed about 
bsd.cl, please file another PR with the exact text you want added. 

The website will be updated to reflect this change within 6 hours. 
Thanks for the submission.
